about_description: Experience fine dining with our international buffet selection.
dinner_buffet_description: Premium dining experience with live counters.
secure_payment_description: Your payment information is encrypted and secure. We never store your card details.
important_item_1: Please show this QR code at the venue
important_item_2: Arrive 15 minutes before your booking time
important_item_3: Valid ID proof required at entry
something_went_wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Try again later.
book_by_category_subtitle: Start with buffet, set menu, or attractions without changing the existing payment flow.
filter_by_type_then_pick_sort: Filter by type, then pick the sort order you want.
price_sort_subtitle: From lowest to highest or the opposite
discount_sort_subtitle: Based on percent or computed savings
rating_sort_subtitle: Higher rated experiences first or last
reset_email_sent_check_inbox: Reset email sent. Please check your inbox.
enter_email_for_reset: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
enter_phone_for_otp_reset: Enter your phone to verify with OTP and set a new password.
enter_new_password_for_account: Enter a new password for your account.
your_bookings_and_qr_passes_will_appear_: Your bookings and QR passes will appear here.
orders_empty_subtitle: Start your first booking and come back here to find your reservation details, pricing, and QR access in one place.
failed_to_cancel_booking: Failed to cancel booking. Please try again.
could_not_save_qr_to_gallery: Could not save QR to gallery.
manage_account_details_access_and_staff_: Manage your account details, access, and staff tools.
please_log_in_to_view_your_profile: Please log in to view your profile.
verify_customer_bookings_on_the_spot: Verify customer bookings on the spot.
shortcuts_available_for_your_account_rol: Shortcuts available for your account role.
your_saved_details_across_the_account: Your saved details across the account.
sign_out_from_this_device_and_return_to_: Sign out from this device and return to login.
tap_to_switch_between_arabic_and_english: Tap to switch between Arabic and English.
permanent_actions_that_remove_your_accou: Permanent actions that remove your account.
delete_account_description: This permanently removes your account and related data. You will not be able to recover it later.
delete_account_warning: This will permanently remove your account and all related data. You will not be able to recover it.
are_you_absolutely_sure: Are you absolutely sure? This action is irreversible.
payment_completed_but_booking_save_faile: Payment was successful but booking save failed. Please contact support. {error}
otp_register_message: Enter the OTP sent to your phone ({phone}) to complete registration.
otp_login_message: Enter the OTP sent to your phone ({phone}) to log in.
otp_reset_message: Enter the OTP sent to your phone ({phone}) to reset your password.
failed_to_save_qr_to_gallery: Failed to save QR to gallery: {error}
booking_flow_set_menu_selection_note: Set menu selection is currently treated as the priced booking option. Actual item choices can be completed later.
highlights_will_appear_here_once_configu: Highlights will appear here once configured.
packages_will_be_loaded_from_attraction_: Packages will be loaded from attraction configuration.
options_will_appear_automatically_when_c: Options will appear automatically when configured.
buffet_fallback_description: Explore a premium buffet experience with flexible meal-based booking and live availability.
set_menu_fallback_description: Choose a fixed set menu experience with clear pricing and a smooth booking flow.
attraction_fallback_description: Discover attraction experiences with time-based entry and package selection.
enter_otp_sent_to_your_phone: Enter the OTP sent to your phone.
verification_link_sent_to_your_new_email: Verification link sent to your new email. Please confirm it.
email_password_sign_in_disabled: Email/Password sign-in is disabled in Firebase.
sign_in_again_and_retry: For security, please sign in again and retry.
phone_verification_failed_please_try_aga: Phone verification failed. Please try again.
no_set_menu_options_for_date: No set menu options are available for this date.
no_meals_available_for_date: No meals are available for this date.
set_menu_option_pricing_subtitle: Each set menu option can carry its own adult and child pricing.
meal_type_booking_subtitle: Select the meal that should be booked for the chosen date.
no_time_slots_available_for_date: No time slots are available for this date.
select_time_subtitle: Different time slots can carry different pricing and package availability.
select_package_subtitle: Only packages available for the selected time slot are shown.
please_choose_available_option_first: Please choose an available option first.
please_add_at_least_one_guest: Please add at least one guest.
selected_option_no_longer_available: The selected option is no longer available. Please choose again.
selected_guests_no_longer_available: Selected guests are no longer available. Please review your quantities.
pricing_was_updated: Pricing was updated. Review the refreshed total and continue again.
go_back_and_choose_available_option_firs: Go back and choose an available option first.
set_menu_item_selection_after_booking: Set menu item selection will be completed after the booking step.
catalog_category_buffet_short_descriptio: Flexible meal-based bookings with date and guest selection.
catalog_category_set_menu_short_descript: Fixed set-menu experiences with later item selection support.
catalog_category_attraction_short_descri: Time-slot packages with dynamic pricing and availability.
catalog_category_buffet_card_subtitle: Breakfast, lunch, dinner, and optional brunch experiences.
catalog_category_set_menu_card_subtitle: Curated set menus with clean pricing and guided selection.
catalog_category_attraction_card_subtitl: Book packages by date and time with dynamic availability.
cancellation_items: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before booking
No refund for cancellations within 24 hours
No-show will result in full charge
know_before_items: Entry allowed 15 minutes before booking time
